command:
TEST_TMPDIR=$(mktemp -d)
DECISIONS_DIR="$TEST_TMPDIR/decisions"
mkdir -p "$DECISIONS_DIR"
ADR_TEMPLATE="plugins/vsdd-factory/templates/adr-template.md"
ARCH_INDEX="$TEST_TMPDIR/ARCH-INDEX.md"

# Create ADR-001 stub
cat > "$DECISIONS_DIR/ADR-001-test.md" <<'EOF'
---
document_type: adr
adr_id: ADR-001
status: proposed
date: 2026-01-01
subsystems_affected: [SS-01]
supersedes: null
superseded_by: null
---
# ADR-001: stub
EOF

# Create ARCH-INDEX
cat > "$ARCH_INDEX" <<'ARCHINDEX'
---
document_type: architecture-index
---

## Subsystem Registry

| SS-ID | Name |
|-------|------|
| SS-01 | Hook Dispatcher Core |
| SS-06 | Skill Catalog |

## Architecture Decisions

| ID      | Decision Summary | Subsystems | File |
|---------|-----------------|------------|------|
| ADR-001 | Test stub        | SS-01      | decisions/ADR-001-test.md |
ARCHINDEX

VALIDATE_BIN="$TEST_TMPDIR/validate.sh"
cat > "$VALIDATE_BIN" <<'EOF'
#!/usr/bin/env bash
exit 0
EOF
chmod +x "$VALIDATE_BIN"

# Test AC-3: supersedes patch
export DECISIONS_DIR ARCH_INDEX ADR_TEMPLATE VALIDATE_BIN
plugins/vsdd-factory/tests/helpers/create-adr-driver.sh --title "New Decision" --subsystems "SS-06" --supersedes "ADR-001" 2>&1
echo "Exit: $?"
echo "---"
cat "$DECISIONS_DIR/ADR-001-test.md" | grep superseded_by

rm -rf "$TEST_TMPDIR"

command:
TMPDIR=$(mktemp -d)
cat > "$TMPDIR/BC-INDEX.md" <<'EOF'
---
total_bcs: 100
---
EOF
cat > "$TMPDIR/STATE.md" <<'EOF'
BCs | 200 |
EOF
echo '{"tool_input":{"file_path":"'"$TMPDIR"'/STATE.md"}}' | bash /Users/jmagady/Dev/vsdd-factory/.worktrees/codify-lessons/plugins/vsdd-factory/hooks/validate-count-propagation.sh
status=$?
rm -rf "$TMPDIR"
echo "Exit status: $status"
